payload.question: Mypy strict gate scope: fix the existing target (A) or narrow it (B)?

reason: Ready for review: mypy strict green outside doctor.py; bug evidence for WP06 handoff recorded; 3 out-of-ownership trivial fixes required by full-run gate. Note: kitty-specs/ artifacts (glossary-fragments/WP01.md, research/doctor-mission-state-1092-bug-evidence.md) are committed on lane branch; need to be moved to planning branch by operator.

review.reference: Review passed (forced through planning-artifact-on-lane gate per operator guidance). VERIFICATION: (1) mypy --strict gate green — zero errors outside doctor.py (6 doctor.py errors remain, owned by WP06). (2) Stubs in [dependency-groups.dev] of pyproject.toml; uv.lock updated. (3) re2 import at src/kernel/_safe_re.py:51 carries type: ignore[import-untyped] + research.md §1 citation. (4) Bug evidence file at kitty-specs/.../research/doctor-mission-state-1092-bug-evidence.md (167 lines, sufficient for WP06 handoff). (5) glossary-fragments/WP01.md present (empty per DoD). (6) Commit message has CHANGELOG note block. CONCERN A (out-of-ownership edits to merge/state.py, status/progress.py, tracker/saas_client.py): ACCEPTED. Empirically verified — without these 4 single-line dead-cast/dead-ignore removals the gate fails with 4 errors outside doctor.py. The stub install in T001 made pre-existing casts/ignores redundant; cleanups are a direct, mechanical, zero-behavior consequence. Files are unowned by any mission WP. PRECEDENT: gate-driven mechanical cleanups in unowned files are acceptable when triggered by the WP's own scoped change. CONCERN B (planning artifacts on lane branch): operator must cherry-pick kitty-specs/* to fix/quality-check-updates before merge — implementer acknowledged in their handoff note. NO TACTIC CITATIONS: acceptable per WP prompt — T003 authors evidence only, T004/T005 are type narrowing only. PRE-EXISTING TEST FAILURE (NOT a WP01 regression): tests/agent/cli/commands/test_sync.py::TestSyncNowExitCodes::test_strict_exits_0_on_success fails due to Mission 7 enforce_teamspace_mission_state_ready gate (sync.py:1055) untouched by WP01. Sibling test_strict_exits_1_on_auth_missing was fixed in PR #1035; this sibling was missed. Recommend follow-up CI-fix PR mirroring #1035.

Ready: 2 cases for happy + dual-failure fallback; runs on every POSIX CI pass via monkeypatch. Planning artifact (glossary fragment) committed to fix/quality-check-updates. Pre-existing WP01 kitty-specs files on lane branch are not owned by WP02.

review.reference: Approved: targeted POSIX test for m_0_8_0 OSError->shutil.copy2 fallback (happy + dual-failure). Cites function-over-form-testing tactic; assertions on file content, is_symlink, and MigrationResult.{success,errors,changes_made} — zero mock-call-count assertions. Glossary fragment 'characterization test' placed on planning branch fix/quality-check-updates (commit c1e012052) per FR-013 — positive precedent over WP01. Tests pass on POSIX without windows_ci marker; 2/2 green. --force used because residual planning artifacts from prior WP01 cleanup remain on the lane branch (WP01.md fragment + doctor research note); operator resolves at merge time per shared-lane workflow nuance.

Ready: Transformer-flavor lift of _canonicalize_status_row + _derive_migration_timestamp rules onto CanonicalRule Protocol. Characterization tests precede every refactor commit (NFR-003 verified). Per-rule unit tests parametrized (31 tests). Code-patterns catalog updated on planning branch. Cites chain-of-responsibility-rule-pipeline, refactoring-extract-first-order-concept, tdd-red-green-refactor, function-over-form-testing tactics. mypy --strict exits 0 on all 3 owned migration files. 48 tests pass.

review.reference: WP03 APPROVED. NFR-003 commit order verified: 606479260 (T011 characterization) precedes 1bd5fc860 (T013) and df8cffe5e (T014). Two-consumer bar met: 10 rules in mission_state._CANONICAL_STATUS_ROW_RULES + 4 rules in rebuild_state._TIMESTAMP_SOURCE_RULES, both consuming CanonicalRule[State]. Doctrine citations verified per commit: tdd-red-green-refactor (606479260), chain-of-responsibility-rule-pipeline + refactoring-extract-first-order-concept (6ecede694, 1bd5fc860, df8cffe5e), function-over-form-testing (cb2cc9067). 48 tests pass (17 characterization + 31 per-rule). mypy --strict clean on all 3 owned migration files. Function-over-form audit: zero mock-based assertions, zero structural assertions, pure value-transformer style throughout. Code-patterns catalog updated on planning branch (199e7294a) cites Transformer-flavor canonicalization.py with both consumers. Glossary fragment (6c73c3997) carries pipeline-shape (0.9) and rule pipeline (0.95) entries, status active. Per-rule purity: mission_state rules pure (only documented generated_ids.append exception); rebuild_state source-collectors necessarily perform file I/O via state-bound feature_dir — acceptable since the rule role is source-collection and the Protocol contract permits state-derived reads. Lane housekeeping clean (dde76b0d0 removed lingering planning artifacts).

Ready: T018 audit found changelog.py has ZERO active regexes (all 3 Sonar-flagged patterns already fixed in commit 4e94c341f / PR #592 before this mission). Wall-clock regression test (T020) guards against re-introduction: 3 adversarial tests + 17 correctness tests, all <20ms vs 100ms budget. Happy-path correctness corpus preserved. Sonar rationales drafted in sonar-hotspot-rationales.md for operator UI application (3 changelog hotspots Safe + 2 cosmetic S6353 Safe + loopback/review-lock deferred to WP07). Glossary fragment authored for 'catastrophic backtracking' (FR-013). Pre-existing test failure test_strict_exits_0_on_success is unrelated to WP04.

review.reference: Approved: pre-mission PR #592 (commit 4e94c341f) already removed the regex hotspots in release/changelog.py; WP04 adds defensive wall-clock regression tests (3 perf + 17 correctness, all green, slowest 0.01s) as future-regression guard per secure-regex-catastrophic-backtracking tactic; Sonar rationales drafted for operator UI application (Safe verdict for 3 hotspots: 1x S5852 + 2x S6353 documented with verbatim paste-ready text); glossary fragment 'catastrophic backtracking' (confidence 0.95, status active) added on planning branch with tactic citation; function-over-form-testing audit clean (elapsed-budget + return-value assertions only, no mock/structural assertions); no locality violations on cycle.py / mission_state.py (WP04 modified zero source files). NOTE: test_strict_exits_0_on_success pre-existing failure flagged 3x now -- propose follow-up sub-WP or WP07 absorption.

Ready: 7 new test files covering charter / charter_bundle / agent_config / internal_runtime / file_lock hot paths per function-over-form-testing tactic; 96/96 tests green; no source modifications (test-only WP); glossary fragment committed to planning branch (fix/quality-check-updates).

review.reference: Approved: 96 behavior-driven tests across 7 files (charter A/B/C, charter_bundle, agent/config, internal_runtime engine+discovery, file_lock) per function-over-form-testing tactic. Zero source modifications (test-only WP boundary respected — diff is 1969 insertions strictly under tests/ and tests/_factories/). Function-over-form audit clean: zero mock.call_count/assert_called_once_with/call_args, zero Path/os.path/read_text/write_text/exists patches, zero full Rich snapshots; MagicMock usage limited to domain stand-ins (interview/result/ctx objects), not call-interaction assertions. NFR-002 hygiene verified: AAA structure with descriptive docstrings, names follow test_<unit>_<behavior>_<context>, shared factories live under tests/_factories/charters/ (full_charter.md, minimal_charter.md, malformed_charter.yaml). Tightness audit: only two 'is not None' guards, each followed by stronger downstream equality (e.g. record.pid == os.getpid()) — no tautological assertions. Local coverage delta on touched modules (this 96-test slice alone): file_lock 85%, discovery 74%, charter_bundle 64%, agent/config 51%, engine 29%, charter 25%. Doctrine citations confirmed on all four commits (749516e9d, 5bb18b602, 03aa79db2 cite function-over-form-testing; bf555e0a3 glossary fragment cites FR-013 with no new terms).

Ready: doctor.py mission_state refactored from CC57 to CC3 thin orchestrator + per-mode runners + shared _emit helper. _print_overdue_details type annotation fixed (ShimRegistryReport, no type:ignore). mypy strict on doctor.py = 0 errors (closes WP01 carve-out). T029 characterization tests (17) pass through all refactor commits. T030 regression (5 tests) locks post-fix behavior. Cites tdd-red-green-refactor, refactoring-extract-first-order-concept, function-over-form-testing. Glossary: structural debt + deliberate linearity on planning branch.

review.reference: Approved: doctor.py mission_state CC57→3 (radon verified); 10 extracted helpers all CC≤9 (radon: _audit_fail_gate=9, _validate_modes=7, _resolve_audit_root=7, _run_audit_mode=6, _run_mission_repair=5, _resolve_fail_on=5, _print_overdue_details=4, _run_teamspace_dry_run_mode=4, _emit_mission_state=2, _emit_json_error=1); mypy strict on doctor.py 0 errors + full repo mypy strict 0 errors across 764 source files → FR-001 (mission-wide) now satisfied; T029 characterization-tests commit (75aad0b98, 502 insertions tests-only) precedes T030 bug-fix commit (fecc5ce5a) and T031-T033 refactor commit (cf9d5eb9c) — NFR-003 verified; T030 fixed _print_overdue_details line 631 (one of TWO bugs WP01's evidence documented — the other being the report=RepairReport|RepoAuditReport variable-aliasing at lines 1080-1130, resolved via T031-T033 Option-B extract per WP01's own recommendation); 22 tests green (17 characterization + 5 regression); function-over-form audit clean (zero mock-internal asserts, one tolerable call_count>=1 smoke assertion in regression test); locality respected — no _auth_doctor.render_report changes per C-003 (WP06 scope: only doctor.py + 2 new test files, 942 insertions); doctrine citations correct on every commit; glossary fragment with 'structural debt' (conf 0.9) + 'deliberate linearity' (conf 0.95), both active, both citing canonical _auth_doctor example and the refactoring tactics.
